title: calliandra rubescens
intro: Calliandra rubescens, also known as pink powder puff or coral powder puff, is a flowering plant native to Central and South America, belonging to the legume family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as reducing fever and pain. Calliandra rubescens is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or topical cream for its medicinal uses.
